issues.description: Missing opponent action: card effect requires opponent to place 2 cards from their trash at bottom of deck before player flips life. DSL only includes Rest and FlipLife, omitting the opponent's mandatory action.
Rest action should be conditional ("You may rest"). Current DSL shows Rest as mandatory without condition.
Missing cost representation: DON!! −1 cost not encoded in DSL. While costs may be metadata, the conditional nature of "may rest" suggests optional trigger resolution.
